label: Image to KG Recursive
description: [EXPERIMENTAL] End-to-end pipeline for non-JPEG image files (TIFF, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP) with recursive KG processing: scatters images, converts to JPEG, OCRs them, then extracts, deduplicates, clusters, describes, and recursively re-clusters. Handles all file processing automatically. This workflow includes clustering steps that are currently unreliable. Not recommended for production use.
